title: ServerGrid
description: A fresh UI for the multiplayer server menu!
body:
# ServerGrid

A Minecraft Fabric mod that replaces the default server list with a modern, grid-based layout.

## Features

- **Grid Layout** - Servers displayed as cards in a configurable grid instead of a vertical list
- **Modern Design** - Clean, opaque card styling with rounded corners and subtle borders
- **Server Icons** - Displays server favicons with fallback placeholder icons
- **Live Status** - Shows player count, ping, and MOTD for each server
- **Search** - search widget to filter servers by name or address
- **Drag & Drop** - Reorder servers by dragging cards
- **Customizable** - In-game settings screen to adjust:
  - Number of columns (1-6)
  - Maximum strip width
  - Card gap spacing
  - Icon size
  - Theme selection (and **Custom theme's** through the config file)
  - Toggle ping bars, text scaling, and placeholder icons

## Requirements

- Fabric Loader 0.18.0+
- Fabric API

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/)
2. Download [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Place ServerGrid jar in your `mods` folder

## Configuration

Access settings via the gear icon in the multiplayer screen, or through Mod Menu if installed.
